_readme: Per-lab settings overrides. Edited by the /admin/labs panel (which commits BOTH copies via GitHub) or by hand. CANONICAL: labs-platform/app/lab-settings.json. MIRROR (must stay identical): shieldsync-website/lib/lab-settings.json — after hand-edits run `node scripts/sync-lab-settings.mjs` from labs-platform/ and commit both repos. Semantics: null / empty array = no override (level pricing + code defaults apply). priceINR is in RUPEES, priceUSD in DOLLARS (major units). keywords replaces the lab's tags everywhere when non-empty. live overrides the catalog ready flag; free overrides the free flag.
